top.title: Israel strikes Lebanon after Hezbollah rocket fire as Iran conflict widens
top.summary: Lebanese officials say 52 people were killed by Israeli strikes, while there are no reports of casualties in Israel.

top.title: 'They hit so hard the house was shaking': Iranians describe impact of US-Israel attacks
top.summary: People in Iran tell the BBC they hear explosions day and night, as the US and Israel continue striking the country for a third day.

top.title: France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies
top.summary: Emmanuel Macron said eight countries could enjoy protection from France's nuclear umbrella - but that Paris would retain sole decision-making power.

top.title: Amazon says drones damaged three facilities in UAE and Bahrain
top.summary: The incidents highlight the vulnerability of key technology infrastructure during military conflicts.

top.title: UK launches consultation asking for views on under-16s social media ban
top.summary: Discussions over what measures to implement to protect children's wellbeing will last for three months.

top.title: Trump orders government to stop using Anthropic in battle over AI use
top.summary: The move announced on social media comes after a standoff between Anthropic's boss and the US Department of Defense.

title.#text: Anthropic upgrades Claude’s memory to attract AI switchers
How the new iPhone 17E stacks up against Apple’s pricier phones
